name: Eagle Car & Limo Svc Inc
recent_news: No M&A or news identified as of 2026.
fit_notes: Micro single-vehicle limo/livery in Jersey City; below Summit's tuck-in size threshold. Not an attractive standalone target; potentially a contractor to larger Hudson County operators (e.g. Hudson County Trans).

name: Salma Limousine Inc
recent_news: No M&A or news identified as of 2026.
fit_notes: Micro Bayonne, NJ limo operation with 2 employees; well below tuck-in scale. Likely a sub-contracted livery vehicle; not an independent school-bus operator suitable for Summit acquisition.

name: TMD Transport
recent_news: No M&A or news identified as of 2026.

name: Ilusiones Limousine Shuttle
recent_news: No M&A or news identified as of 2026.
fit_notes: Micro El Paso limo/shuttle operator (2 employees). Not a school-bus contractor; minimal strategic fit for Summit. Largest local school-transport peer is El Paso-LA Limousine Express (~120 employees), unrelated.

name: Express Mobility
